deferred_action.action: Human must append the following section to CLAUDE.md
deferred_action.text:
## Agent Pipeline Protocol

All agent work flows through sys/runtime/ inbox/outbox pipeline.

### Flow
1. Foreman (Claude.ai) + Dave write packet → drop in inbox/orchestrator/
2. Pipeline runs autonomously: Orchestrator → Planner → Builder → DB Agent → Auditor
3. Auditor does final QA → drops report in outbox/auditor/
4. Foreman reviews Auditor report → moves to completed/ → closes BAR

### Rules
- Foreman touches pipeline TWICE: front (write packet) and back (review Auditor)
- Agents pass work autonomously between stops — no foreman gate in the middle
- Auditor is the quality gate, not the foreman
- Any agent can halt pipeline with status=failed
- NEVER skip the inbox. NEVER paste instructions manually.
- Packet format: see sys/runtime/PACKET_CONTRACT.md
